ValidationRule.description: Ticket #1086969 When (Status = Pending Action) > users can only choose one of the following: (Status = Resubmitted) or (Status = Cancelled) or (Status = Completed)
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Pending Client')), $Profile.Name <> 'SW Legal', $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps Extended', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Legal_Services', ISCHANGED(Status__c), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), 'Pending Action'), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Resubmitted')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Cancelled')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'In Process')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Completed')) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Hey, only the Legal or Finance team has permissions to change the request to this status
